calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conferene
Matthew Sepuya, Esq. for Judgment Creditor, Hideki Makiyama
charles Smith, Esq., for Judgment Debtor, Yasuo Ito
Eri Monoura, Japanese Interperter for Judgment Debtor, Yasuo Ito
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 Court reporter,

PLAINTIFF HIDEKI MAKIYAMA, HIROAKI MAKIYAMA HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

Court states to counsel that according to the Levying officer, San Mateo County Sheriff's Office, did not receive Claim of Exemption papers, from the Judgment Debtor. Counsel for Judgment Debtor States that a Claim of Exemption was not filed. Counsel for the Judgment Creditor states that it is his understaind that a claim of Expetion hearing and order were required in order for to Wells Fargo Bank to release funds in an amount above the mandatory Social Security exemption.

Hearing is held. Court rules as follows:

Without any objection, the amount held in excess of the statutorily-exempt amount shall be released to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed.
